question: What are the Copper Shortsword's stats, and who starts with it?
ideal_answer: The Copper Shortsword deals 5 melee damage with a use time of 13 (Very fast) and knockback 4. All newly created characters spawn with a Copper Shortsword (Iron Shortsword in Journey Mode).

question: What does the Confused debuff do to player controls?
ideal_answer: Confused reverses left/right movement controls; left acts as right and vice versa. Horizontal wing flight is also inverted, but vertical movement is unaffected.

question: How do I craft a Wooden Sword?
ideal_answer: Craft 7 Wood at a Work Bench.

question: What are the Eye of Cthulhu's stats, and what does it drop?
ideal_answer: 23 damage (Classic mode), no defense, immune to Confused, spawns at night on the surface. Drops Demonite or Crimtane Ore depending on world type, Unholy Arrows, Lesser Healing Potions, Binoculars (2.5%); Expert Mode also drops the Shield of Cthulhu.

question: How do I summon Skeletron?
ideal_answer: Speak to the Old Man at the Dungeon entrance at night and select the option to break his curse; he transforms into Skeletron.

question: What does the Wall of Flesh drop, and what does defeating it unlock?
ideal_answer: Drops the Pwnhammer and one of four class emblems (Warrior, Ranger, Sorcerer, or Summoner Emblem, each at 25%). Defeating the Wall of Flesh permanently activates Hardmode.

question: What are the Megashark's stats and how is it crafted?
ideal_answer: 25 ranged damage, use time 7 (Insanely fast), velocity 10, 50% chance not to consume ammo. Crafted from 1 Minishark, 1 Illegal Gun Parts, 5 Shark Fin, and 20 Soul of Might at a Mythril Anvil.

question: What does Skeletron Prime drop?
ideal_answer: 25-40 Souls of Fright and 15-30 Hallowed Bars on every kill, plus Greater Healing Potions and a Skeletron Prime Mask at 14.29%.

question: Is the Megashark or the Uzi better for a ranger build?
ideal_answer: The Megashark has the highest accuracy, lowest use time (7 vs 9), and is easier to obtain; the Uzi has higher base damage (30 vs 25) and automatically converts Musket Balls to High Velocity Bullets. Both are strong mid-Hardmode options.

question: What does Golem drop and how do I summon him?
ideal_answer: Drops Beetle Husks (always) and Picksaw (25%), plus several 14.29%-chance weapons: Possessed Hatchet, Sun Stone, Eye of the Golem, Heat Ray, Staff of Earth, and Golem Fist. Summoned by using a Lihzahrd Power Cell at the Lihzahrd Altar inside the Jungle Temple, only after Plantera is defeated.

question: What armor should a Mage use after defeating Plantera?
ideal_answer: Spectre armor is the primary post-Plantera mage set. The Hood variant provides life steal while the Mask variant converts hits into damage orbs; switching between both depending on the situation is the most efficient approach.

question: How do I craft the Terra Blade and what are its stats?
ideal_answer: 85 melee damage, use time 18 (Very fast). Crafted from 1 True Night's Edge, 1 True Excalibur, and 1 Broken Hero Sword at a Mythril Anvil.

question: What weapons does the Moon Lord drop?
ideal_answer: Each of the following has a 20% drop chance: Meowmere, Terrarian, Star Wrath, S.D.M.G., Celebration Mk2, Last Prism, and Lunar Flare. He also always drops 70-90 Luminite and the Portal Gun.

question: How do I craft the Stardust Dragon Staff and what does it do?
ideal_answer: 40 summon damage, use time 36 (Very slow). Crafted from 18 Stardust Fragments at an Ancient Manipulator. It summons a Stardust Dragon minion that grows longer each time additional staves are used.

question: After defeating Golem, what should I do next to progress toward the final boss?
ideal_answer: Defeat the Lunatic Cultists at the Dungeon entrance to summon the Lunatic Cultist boss, which drops the Ancient Manipulator and initiates the Lunar Events. Destroy all four Celestial Pillars to trigger the Moon Lord.
